ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the game */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game (e.g., Action, Adventure, Role-Playing) */,
  "console" TEXT /* Console(s) the game is available on (e.g., PS4, Xbox One, Nintendo Switch) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the game */,
  "developer" TEXT /* The company or individual who developed the game */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* The company responsible for publishing the game */,
  "esrb_rating" TEXT /* ESRB rating to indicate the age-appropriateness of the game */,
  "rating_count" INTEGER /* The number of ratings the game has received */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* The average rating of the game */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the game */,
  "cover_art" TEXT /* URL to the game's cover art image */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the game's trailer video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "parent_genre" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consoles" (
  "console_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each console */,
  "console_name" TEXT /* Name of the console */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* The company that manufactures the console */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* The year the console was released */,
  "generation" TEXT /* The generation of the console */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("console_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "pros" TEXT /* A list of positive aspects of the game */,
  "cons" TEXT /* A list of negative aspects of the game */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* The number of times this review has been marked as helpful by other users */,
  "unhelpful_count" INTEGER /* The number of times this review has been marked as unhelpful by other users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "preferred_genres" TEXT /* A list of genres the user prefers */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* The date the user joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_genres" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_consoles" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "console_id" INTEGER /* ID of the console */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "console_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game recommended */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the recommendation (0-1) */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* The recommendation algorithm used */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the recommendation was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
